name: PostgreSQL
sampleLines: 2024-04-28 04:02:03.123 UTC [12345] LOG:  database system is ready to accept connections
2024-04-28 04:02:04 UTC [12346] postgres@mydb ERROR:  relation "users" does not exist
2024-04-28 04:02:05.456 [12347] WARNING:  there is no transaction in progress
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/postgres_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). The default log_line_prefix on modern PostgreSQL ships timestamp + pid + optional user@database + severity (LOG/ERROR/FATAL/...) followed by ':  message' (two spaces). All severity tokens come from PostgreSQL's elog.c enum.
